creator: maxtaylor@mail.ru
text:
I try boot with one or two SATA disk  ad4: 38166MB <Maxtor 6E040T0/NAN51680> [77545/16/63]. But kernel stop boot process on "ad#" drive detect.
Just turn off SATA "ad" devices and restart then kernel boot succes.
My DMESG output: (without SATA "ad" devices)

How-To-Repeat: Just plug in SATA HDD to ASUS m2n32-sli motherboard and try boot 6.1
FreeBSD GENERIC.
